title: Associate Software Engineer
description:
Rippling unifies HR, IT, and Finance on a single platform for 10,000+ companies. We're automating the entire employee lifecycle.

We're seeking a Associate Software Engineer to join our HR Tech team in Richmond. This role offers the opportunity to contribute meaningfully to our mission while developing your professional skills in a collaborative environment.
responsibilities: Develop and maintain full-stack web and mobile applications
Implement features and bug fixes following coding standards and best practices
Write unit and integration tests to ensure code quality
Collaborate with senior engineers through code reviews and pair programming
Participate in system design discussions and architectural decisions
Support deployment and troubleshoot production issues

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or equivalent bootcamp/self-taught experience
requirements.experience_years: 0-2 years of professional software development experience
certifications: None required; bootcamp or portfolio projects appreciated
